title: oxylobium lineare
intro: Oxylobium lineare, also known as the New Zealand fern-leaved oxylobium or simply fern-leaved oxylobium, is a small shrub native to New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oxylobium lineare include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
